context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the version-api instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Create controllers** — Inherit from the previous version's controller and override only changed actions.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Run compatibility specs** — Execute `rspec spec/requests/api/backward_compatibility_spec.rb` to confirm no regressions.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: All existing v1 contract tests must remain green; a new version should never silently break prior consumers.
